name: Manage Reasons
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Manage Reasons","bold":true},{"text":" settings allow you to create and maintain a standardized set of reasons that can be selected when processing "},{"text":"returns, refunds, and cancellations","bold":true},{"text":". Instead of relying on free-text inputs, these predefined reasons ensure that post-order actions are handled in a consistent and structured way across your store."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"By using standardized reasons, internal teams can quickly understand why an order action was taken, reduce ambiguity during order management, and maintain uniform reporting. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This also improves customer communication by ensuring that clear, predefined explanations are used when orders are returned, refunded, or cancelled."}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"To access"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Go to "},{"text":"Back Office → Settings → Manage Reasons","bold":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/AR1M96MLB2T9/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/AR1M96MLB2T9/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":1247730,"width":1920,"height":1084,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FAR1M96MLB2T9%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2065,"dateInserted":"2026-01-27T06:16:19+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Reasons Dashboard"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When you open "},{"text":"Manage Reasons","bold":true},{"text":", you will see a list of all reasons that currently exist in the system. This page provides a centralized view to review and manage your reasons."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/N53VV6JHOO1G/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/N53VV6JHOO1G/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":333719,"width":1920,"height":1084,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FN53VV6JHOO1G%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2066,"dateInserted":"2026-01-27T06:16:38+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The dashboard displays the following information for each reason:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Reason Label","bold":true},{"text":" – The name shown internally (for example, "},{"text":"Missing Items","italic":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"Poor Quality","italic":true},{"text":")."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Reason Value","bold":true},{"text":" – The underlying value stored and used by the system."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Reason Type","bold":true},{"text":" – Indicates where the reason can be used:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Return"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Refund"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Cancellation"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Date Added","bold":true},{"text":" – When the reason was created."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Updated At","bold":true},{"text":" – When the reason was last modified."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Actions","bold":true},{"text":" – Options to manage the reason:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Edit","bold":true},{"text":" – Update the reason details"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Duplicate","bold":true},{"text":" – Create a copy of the reason"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Delete","bold":true},{"text":" – Remove the reason from the system"}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This page helps you quickly review existing reasons and maintain a clean, consistent list."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Create a New Reason"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To add a new reason, click "},{"text":"New Reason","bold":true},{"text":" from the top of the Reasons page."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/28NWCJV37AX0/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/28NWCJV37AX0/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":1383486,"width":1920,"height":1084,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F28NWCJV37AX0%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2067,"dateInserted":"2026-01-27T06:16:58+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In the "},{"text":"Create Reason","bold":true},{"text":" panel, enter the following details:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Label","bold":true},{"text":"
A clear, user-friendly name for the reason."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Value","bold":true},{"text":"
The system value associated with the reason. This is required and should be unique."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Reason Type","bold":true},{"text":"
Select where the reason will be used:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Return"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Refund"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Cancellation"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Description","bold":true},{"text":"
Optional additional context to explain when or why the reason should be used."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/FZZ0WVPWDZR4/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/FZZ0WVPWDZR4/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":1354349,"width":1920,"height":1084,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FFZZ0WVPWDZR4%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2068,"dateInserted":"2026-01-27T06:17:22+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once all required fields are completed, click "},{"text":"Save","bold":true},{"text":". "}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/YXL899UZIOFP/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/YXL899UZIOFP/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":1353040,"width":1920,"height":1084,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FYXL899UZIOFP%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2069,"dateInserted":"2026-01-27T06:17:45+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"The new reason will appear in the Reasons list and be available for use in the selected workflow."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/X1XKC40IHX95/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/X1XKC40IHX95/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":1396287,"width":1920,"height":1084,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FX1XKC40IHX95%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":2070,"dateInserted":"2026-01-27T06:18:05+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
